title: myosotis alpina var. corsicana
intro: Myosotis alpina var. corsicana, commonly known as Alpine Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpine Forget-me-not include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Alpine Forget-me-not is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
